Neksus JobSpec (neksus-jobspec)

Purpose
- Local-first CLI and Python package for creating, validating, inspecting, and rendering structured JobSpec YAML files.

Install
- pip install neksus-jobspec

Core CLI Commands
- neksus-jobspec version
- neksus-jobspec init
- neksus-jobspec spec new <name>
- neksus-jobspec spec validate <path>
- neksus-jobspec spec render <path> --format web|json-ld
- neksus-jobspec check

Public Python API
- from neksus_jobspec import JobSpec, load_jobspec, validate_jobspec, render_jobspec

v0.2.x Composition Model
- Job-detail pages are composed from controlled, typed components.
- Assistants must use documented `components` types, variants, and placement values only.
- Assistants must not invent unsupported component types or variants.
- Validate before render.
- Prefer JSON-LD render output for automation.
- Legacy simple-schema JobSpec payloads are removed in v0.2.x.
- For web output portability, assistants may set `rendering.web.asset_base_url` (or CLI `--asset-base-url`) when relative media paths are used.

Security and boundaries
- Custom CSS is supported.
- Theme customization in v0.2.x is CSS-first.
- Rendering produces output only and does not execute scripts.
- Hosted API: planned, not implemented.
- MCP server: planned, not implemented.
